Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.state

Class CollectorsObservable

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.state.CollectorsObservable
@AvailableSince("0.0.50") public class CollectorsObservable extends Object
A factory class for creating CollectorObservable instances.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E> CollectorObservable<E,? extends List<E>,ListObservable<E>>
    toList()
    Creates a CollectorObservable that generates observable lists.
    static <E> CollectorObservable<E,? extends List<E>,ListObservable<E>>
    toList(Function<Collection<E>,? extends List<E>> snapshot, IntFunction<? extends List<E>> collection)
    Creates a CollectorObservable that generates observable lists.
    static <E> CollectorObservable<E,? extends Set<E>,SetObservable<E>>
    toSet()
    Creates a new CollectorObservable that uses Set.copyOf(Collection) as the snapshot function and HashSet as the collection function.
    static <E> CollectorObservable<E,? extends Set<E>,SetObservable<E>>
    toSet(Function<Collection<E>,? extends Set<E>> snapshot, IntFunction<? extends Set<E>> collection)
    Creates a CollectorObservable that generates observable sets.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • toSet

      public static <E> CollectorObservable<E,? extends Set<E>,SetObservable<E>> toSet()
      Creates a new CollectorObservable that uses Set.copyOf(Collection) as the snapshot function and HashSet as the collection function.
      Type Parameters:
      E - The type of elements in the collection.
      Returns:
      A new CollectorObservable instance.

    • toSet

      public static <E> CollectorObservable<E,? extends Set<E>,SetObservable<E>> toSet(Function<Collection<E>,? extends Set<E>> snapshot, IntFunction<? extends Set<E>> collection)
      Creates a CollectorObservable that generates observable sets. The resulting SetObservable can observe changes to a set collection. This method allows specifying custom snapshot and collection creation functions.
      Type Parameters:
      E - The type of elements in the observable set.
      Parameters:
      snapshot - A function that takes a Collection of elements and creates a snapshot Set.
      collection - A function that takes an integer initial capacity and creates a new mutable Set.
      Returns:
      A CollectorObservable configured to produce SetObservable instances.

    • toList

      public static <E> CollectorObservable<E,? extends List<E>,ListObservable<E>> toList()
      Creates a CollectorObservable that generates observable lists. The resulting ListObservable can observe changes to a list collection. This method uses List.copyOf(Collection) as the snapshot function and ArrayList as the collection creation function.
      Type Parameters:
      E - The type of elements in the observable list.
      Returns:
      A CollectorObservable configured to produce ListObservable instances.

    • toList

      public static <E> CollectorObservable<E,? extends List<E>,ListObservable<E>> toList(Function<Collection<E>,? extends List<E>> snapshot, IntFunction<? extends List<E>> collection)
      Creates a CollectorObservable that generates observable lists. The resulting ListObservable can observe changes to a list collection. This method allows specifying custom snapshot and collection creation functions.
      Type Parameters:
      E - The type of elements in the observable list.
      Parameters:
      snapshot - A function that takes a Collection of elements and creates a snapshot List.
      collection - A function that takes an integer initial capacity and creates a new mutable List.
      Returns:
      A CollectorObservable configured to produce ListObservable instances.
